title: centratherum frutescens
intro: Centratherum frutescens, also known as bitter grass or bitter herb, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centratherum frutescens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Centratherum frutescens can be prepared as a tea, infused in oil, or used in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
